prohibited_claim: critical path is an approved programme
allowed_wording: Stage 13A is a handover control and critical path map only
Work packages show the evidence needed to close blockers in a future reviewed process

prohibited_claim: 90 day plan authorises spend or procurement
allowed_wording: The 90-day plan is a planning control only and does not authorise spend or procurement
Handover material is simulation guidance and must be replaced by real officer and authority decisions for real-world use
All WPL approval consultation OBC FBC and statutory gates remain blocked until their own evidence and reviews pass
